case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SALVADOR MACIEL I

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-15-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SALVADOR MACIEL I, DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED [RETURNED BY THE LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT **WITHOUT** THE ORIGINAL WRIT ATTACHED] AS TO DEFENDANT MACIEL I, SALVADOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,239.54 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MACIEL I, SALVADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACIEL I, SALVADOR $1,849.54 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,954.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $890.52 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MACIEL I, SALVADOR
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MACIEL I, SALVADOR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPOURTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LALVADOR MACIEL I IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2019 - JUDGMENT.
